cloudfront.streamingdistribution.trusted.Description: An AWS account number that contains active CloudFront key pairs that CloudFront can use to verify the signatures of signed URLs and signed cookies. If the AWS account that owns the key pairs is the same account that owns the CloudFront distribution, the value of this field is `self`.
This field is `true` if any of the AWS accounts have public keys that CloudFront can use to verify the signatures of signed URLs and signed cookies. If not, this field is `false`.
